name: GIGABYTE B360N GSM Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1151 - Intel B360 Chipset - Supports DDR4-2666 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - 2x HDMI - USB 3.1 Gen1 Type-A - 2x Intel Gigabit LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE B360N GSM Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1151 - Intel
description: Entry-level Mini-ITX motherboard for Intel 8th/9th gen with B360 chipset and dual LAN ports.
